name: Fnf Hypnos Lullaby: “She found her lover”
description:
SHES FOUND YOU... IN AN CAVE?

The Pokémon world is a scary place, living in any region has its benefits and drawbacks, and Pokémon are no exception to this debate all so now girlfriend worried what happen to her girlfriend?

She sets out to find her and runs into hypno... who kidnaps her but finds her in an cave, even if she kidnapped she has her beloved in her arms again, and the groceries too

She would do anything for her girlfriend to be safe and sound... hopefully hypno isn’t coming back soon to claim his meals...
creator: Lilithness
